mission.description: The continent's skills-first hiring platform. Pre-assessed candidates, smart matching, and digital employment records — across 54 African countries.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Simple steps to connect talent with opportunity
how_it_works.candidate_step1_desc: Create your account and complete our 10-question aptitude test. Score 70%+ to unlock your profile.
how_it_works.candidate_step2_desc: Showcase your top 5 skills, work experience, and professional references to stand out.
how_it_works.candidate_step3_desc: Receive custom assessments from employers and land your dream job with verified skills.
how_it_works.employer_step1_desc: Start with 30 days free access. No credit card required. Explore our talent database.
how_it_works.employer_step2_desc: Use advanced filters to find pre-vetted candidates by skills, experience, and test scores.
how_it_works.employer_step3_desc: Create custom tests, evaluate results instantly, and hire with confidence.

features.subtitle: The most advanced job matching platform ecosystem in Africa
features.verified_skills_desc: Every candidate passes rigorous aptitude tests. No more resume guesswork—only proven talent.
features.lightning_fast_desc: Find qualified candidates in minutes, not weeks. Advanced AI-powered matching algorithms.
features.affordable_desc: 30-day free trial, then competitive local pricing. Unlimited access to premium talent pool.
features.data_driven_desc: Make informed hiring decisions with detailed analytics, test scores, and performance metrics.
features.custom_tests_desc: Create role-specific assessments with automated scoring. Test exactly what matters for your role.
features.support_desc: Round-the-clock customer support to help you succeed. We're here whenever you need us.

subscription.subtitle: Free for candidates. Affordable for employers.
subscription.verified_skills_desc: All candidates pass rigorous aptitude tests with 70%+ scores
subscription.lightning_fast_desc: Find qualified candidates in minutes with AI-powered matching
subscription.affordable_desc: Competitive pricing for unlimited access to premium talent across Africa

faq.trial_q: How does the free trial work?
faq.trial_a: Sign up and get 30 days of full access to our platform with no credit card required. After the trial, you can choose to subscribe at competitive local pricing or cancel anytime.
faq.cancel_a: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees.
faq.payment_q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.payment_a: We accept all major payment methods through Paystack, including cards, bank transfers, and mobile money.
faq.candidates_q: How many candidates can I contact?
faq.candidates_a: With a Premium subscription, you have unlimited access to search and contact candidates. There are no limits on the number of searches or assessments you can create.
faq.refunds_a: We don't offer refunds for partial months, but you can cancel at any time to avoid future charges. Try our 30-day free trial to ensure Jorbex is right for you.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using Jorbex, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

section2.title: 2. User Accounts
section2.intro: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms.
section2.item1: You are responsible for safeguarding your account password
section2.item2: You must not share your account credentials with third parties
section2.item3: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
section2.item4: You are responsible for all activities under your account

section3.title: 3. For Candidates
section3.intro: As a candidate on Jorbex, you agree to:
section3.item1: Provide truthful and accurate information in your profile
section3.item2: Complete the aptitude test honestly without external assistance
section3.item3: Maintain a minimum score of 70% to keep your profile active

section4.title: 4. For Employers
section4.intro: As an employer on Jorbex, you agree to:
section4.item1: Comply with all applicable employment laws in Nigeria and Africa
section4.item2: Use candidate information solely for recruitment purposes
section4.item3: Not discriminate based on protected characteristics
section4.item4: Pay subscription fees as agreed after 30-day trial
section4.item5: Conduct fair and transparent hiring processes

section5.title: 5. Subscription and Payment
section5.intro: Employers receive a 30-day free trial. After the trial period:
section5.item1: Monthly subscription fees apply based on your currency
section5.item5: We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days notice

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
section6.content: The Jorbex platform, including all content, features, and functionality, is owned by Jorbex and protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

section7.title: 7. Prohibited Activities
section7.item1: Use the platform for any illegal purpose
section7.item2: Harass, abuse, or harm other users
section7.item4: Scrape or collect data without permission
section7.item5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the platform
section7.item6: Post false, misleading, or fraudulent information

section8.title: 8. Termination
section8.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or any other reason we deem necessary to protect our platform and users.

section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
section9.content: Jorbex shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.

section10.title: 10. Governing Law
section10.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

section11.title: 11. Contact Us
section11.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

payroll_calculator.title: Payroll
payroll_calculator.subtitle: Calculate net salary, PAYE tax, and statutory deductions instantly.
payroll_calculator.note_ng: Based on Nigeria PAYE 2026 bands, PENCOM (8%), NHF (2.5%), NSITF (1%). CRA applied.
payroll_calculator.note_ke: Based on Kenya KRA PAYE 2026 bands, SHIF (2.75%), NSSF Tier I & II, Housing Levy (1.5%).
payroll_calculator.note_za: Based on South Africa SARS PAYE 2026 bands, primary rebate R17,235/yr, UIF (1%, capped at R177/mo).
payroll_calculator.note_gh: Based on Ghana GRA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, SSNIT pension (5.5%).
payroll_calculator.note_tz: Based on Tanzania TRA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, NSSF (10%).
payroll_calculator.note_ug: Based on Uganda URA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, NSSF (5%).
payroll_calculator.note_rw: Based on Rwanda RRA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, RSSB Pension (3%), Medical (7.5%), Maternity (0.3%).
payroll_calculator.note_eg: Based on Egypt ETA PAYE 2026 annual bands, personal exemption E£20,000/yr, Social Insurance (11%, capped).
payroll_calculator.note_et: Based on Ethiopia ERCA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, Employee Pension (7%).
payroll_calculator.note_sn: Based on Senegal DGID IRPP 2026 annual bands (20% professional deduction), IPRES Pension (5.6%).
payroll_calculator.note_ci: Based on Côte d'Ivoire DGI IGR 2026 monthly bands, CNPS Pension (6.3%), CMU Health (3.4%).
payroll_calculator.note_ma: Based on Morocco DGI IR 2026 annual bands, CNSS (4.48%, capped), AMO Health (2.26%).
payroll_calculator.note_zm: Based on Zambia ZRA PAYE 2026 monthly bands, NAPSA (5%, capped ZMW 1,680), NHIMA (1%).
payroll_calculator.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. Consult a qualified accountant for official payroll filings.

help.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is here to help.

employment_law.title: Employment Law in Africa
employment_law.subtitle: A comprehensive guide to employment regulations across African nations

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: Employment law in Africa varies by country but shares common principles rooted in international labor standards, constitutional rights, and local legislation. This guide provides key information for employers and employees operating across the continent.

employment_law.note: Note: This page contains detailed legal information specific to each country. The content below is provided in English for reference. For legal matters, please consult with a qualified employment lawyer in your jurisdiction.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This information is provided for general guidance only and does not constitute legal advice. Employment laws are subject to change and vary by jurisdiction. For specific legal matters, consult with a qualified employment lawyer in your country.

assistance.title: Need Legal Assistance?
assistance.intro: For employment law questions or concerns, contact:
assistance.note: We can connect you with employment law experts in your region.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.content: Jorbex ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

section2.title: 2. Information We Collect
candidates: Personal information (name, email, phone number, location)

section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
section3.intro: We use the collected information for:
items: Improving our platform and user experience

section4.title: 4. Information Sharing
section4.intro: We share your information only in the following circumstances:
section4.employers_desc: Candidate profiles are visible to subscribed employers
section4.legal_desc: When required by law or to protect our rights
section4.business_desc: In case of merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
section4.no_sell: We do NOT sell your personal information to third parties.

section5.title: 5. Data Security
section5.intro: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information:
items: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.intro: Under Nigerian Data Protection Regulation (NDPR) and other applicable laws, you have the right to:
items: Object to processing of your data

section7.title: 7. Data Retention
section7.content: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. After account deletion, we may retain certain information for legal compliance, dispute resolution, and fraud prevention purposes.

section8.title: 8. Cookies
section8.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

section9.title: 9. Children's Privacy
section9.content: Our services are not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

section10.title: 10. International Data Transfers
section10.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries outside Nigeria. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

section11.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
section11.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

section12.title: 12. Contact Us
section12.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us at:

homepage.features_subtitle: From the first application to the signed employment letter — Jorbex covers the entire talent lifecycle.
homepage.feat_video_desc: Conduct live one-way or panel video interviews directly inside Jorbex. Schedule, record, and replay — no external tools needed.
homepage.feat_proctored_desc: AI-proctored aptitude and skills tests with camera monitoring, tab-switch detection, and instant verified score certificates.
homepage.feat_matching_desc: Candidates are matched to roles based on verified expertise, test scores, and profile completeness — not just keywords.
homepage.feat_messaging_desc: Real-time chat between candidates and employers. Built-in inbox with notification alerts so nothing falls through the cracks.
homepage.feat_payroll_desc: Multi-jurisdiction payroll tools covering 13 African tax systems. Calculate net pay, statutory deductions, and generate payslips.
homepage.feat_records_desc: Issue verifiable employment letters, certificates, and payslips. Candidates carry tamper-proof digital credentials for life.
homepage.feat_programmes_desc: Dedicated portals for government internships, university placements, and corporate graduate schemes — each with invite codes and reporting.
homepage.feat_scheduling_desc: Automated calendar invites, reminders, and rescheduling. Candidates book slots, employers confirm — zero back-and-forth email.
homepage.feat_multilingual_desc: Built for Africa first. Supports English, French, Arabic, and Portuguese across all 54 countries with localised compliance rules.
homepage.how_subtitle: Simple, fast, and transparent — from first sign-up to first day at work.
homepage.how_c_journey: Your journey to a new job
homepage.how_c1_desc: Sign up free, add your CV, expertise, and verify your identity in minutes.
homepage.how_c2_desc: Take a proctored aptitude or skills assessment to earn a verified score badge.
homepage.how_c3_desc: Employers find you by score and skills. Apply with one click or wait to be headhunted.
homepage.how_c4_desc: Schedule video or in-person interviews, receive an offer, and download your digital employment letter.
homepage.how_e_journey: Your path to the right hire
homepage.how_e1_desc: Create a job listing with requirements, salary, and test criteria — live in under 3 minutes.
homepage.how_e2_desc: Filter a pre-screened candidate pool by test score, expertise, location, and availability.
homepage.how_e3_desc: Assign custom assessments to shortlisted candidates and run video interviews in-platform.
homepage.how_e4_desc: Issue digital offer letters, set up payroll calculations, and generate employment records.
homepage.prog_title: Running a government scheme, university placement, or corporate graduate programme?
homepage.prog_desc: Dedicated portals with invite codes, cohort management, verified assessments, and real-time reporting — built for institutional buyers.
homepage.trust_v_desc: Every candidate on Jorbex has completed a proctored skills assessment. You see verified scores, not self-reported claims.
homepage.trust_a_desc: Not a global tool retrofitted for Africa. Built from scratch for African payroll laws, local currencies, and pan-African hiring realities.
homepage.trust_s_desc: SOC2-aligned infrastructure, encrypted records, and GDPR-compatible data handling. Your candidates' data stays private.
homepage.trust_f_desc: Post a job, find matched candidates, send an assessment, and schedule a video interview — all in under an hour.
homepage.trust_p_desc: Candidates always free. Employers on a simple subscription or pay-per-hire model. No hidden fees, no surprises.
homepage.trust_sup_desc: Real humans available in EN, FR, AR, and PT. Account managers for institutional clients. Fast-track onboarding for enterprise.
homepage.cta_eyebrow: Join thousands of candidates and employers
homepage.cta_subtitle: Candidates sign up free. Employers get a full-featured trial. No credit card required.

programmes.hero_desc: Jorbex Programmes gives governments, universities, and corporations a dedicated platform to run internships, student placements, and managed hiring — with verified assessments, digital records, and branded portals.
programmes.types_desc: Each type has its own branded public portal, separate onboarding, and pricing model built for institutional buyers.
programmes.gov_desc: Run national internship and youth employment schemes through Jorbex. Manage thousands of placements with verified skills assessments, digital records, and real-time reporting dashboards.
programmes.gov_pricing_note: Quoted per cohort or annual licence
programmes.uni_desc: Give your students a direct path to employment. Partner with Jorbex to connect your graduates with verified employers across Africa and globally — with placement tracking and careers office tools.
programmes.uni_f3: Employer partnerships exclusive to your institution
programmes.uni_f5: Restrict access by institution email domain
programmes.corp_desc: Stop sifting through CVs. Tell us what you need and our verified candidate pool — pre-screened with proctored assessments — is matched directly to your open roles. Pay only when you hire.
programmes.corp_f2: Dedicated talent pool for your company
programmes.corp_pricing_note: No upfront cost — pay when you hire
programmes.how_desc: From setup to your first placed candidate in four steps
programmes.how_s1_desc: Create a programme manager account and select your programme type
programmes.how_s2_desc: Brand your portal, assign jobs, set access rules, and generate invite codes
programmes.how_s3_desc: Share your portal link and invite codes. Candidates join with one click.
programmes.how_s4_desc: Monitor enrolments, assessment scores, applications, and placements in real time
programmes.cta_desc: Join the institutions already using Jorbex to connect Africa's talent with opportunity.
